description_long: This object is a robust, compact hammer with a cylindrical, barrel-shaped handle and a thick, rectangular head. The head features a wide, flat striking surface on one side and a U-shaped slot on the opposite side, suggesting a specialized function, possibly for demolition or heavy-duty tasks. The handle is segmented with three prominent grooves, providing a secure grip and enhancing control during use. The entire hammer appears to be constructed from a single piece of dark, matte-finished metal, giving it a solid and durable appearance. There are no visible markings, logos, or decorative elements, emphasizing its utilitarian design. The surface shows no signs of wear, scratches, or damage, indicating it is either new or well-maintained.
description: A solid, dark metal hammer with a barrel-shaped grooved handle and a thick, rectangular head featuring a U-shaped slot. The design is utilitarian and heavy-duty, with no visible markings or wear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flat, rectangular striking face and the full length of the grooved handle.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the U-shaped slot in the hammer head and the cylindrical handle profile.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the flat back of the hammer head and the handle's grooves.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the U-shaped slot and the handle's rounded form.
attribute_handle_type: integrated steel handle, barrel-shaped with three circumferential grooves for grip, straight and robust, matte finish
attribute_head_type: rectangular steel head with a wide, flat striking face and a U-shaped slot on the opposite side, resembling a specialized demolition or utility hammer
